name: web3-daily-mcp
description: MCP Server for Web3 Daily - Real-time Web3 research digest with macro news, KOL sentiment, market data, and personalized wallet analysis.
author: alexwang

tools.name: get_public_digest
tools.description: Get today's Web3 public digest with macro news, KOL sentiment, and market data

tools.name: get_personalized_digest
tools.description: Get personalized Web3 digest based on wallet's on-chain behavior

tools.name: get_wallet_profile
tools.description: Analyze wallet's on-chain behavior and investment style

tools.name: get_market_overview
tools.description: Get current BTC/ETH prices and Fear & Greed Index

dataCollection.purpose: Generate on-chain profile and personalized digest (only for personalized features)
